global_description: Medium-sized mammal with a stocky body, bushy tail, and distinctive facial mask. Its fur is grayish-brown with a coarse texture, and it has black rings around its eyes and a ringed tail. The ears are small and rounded.

part_details.head: Rounded with a distinctive black mask around the eyes
part_details.tail: Bushy with alternating dark and light rings
part_details.ears: Small and rounded, covered in fur
part_details.legs: Short and sturdy, adapted for climbing

spatial_relations: Head at front with mask around eyes
Tail extends from rear with rings
